title: Rhinoceropolis and Glob Struggle to Reopen After Denver Shut Them Down

# Rhinoceropolis and Glob Struggle to Reopen After Denver Shut Them Down

Two-year retrospective on the Rhinoceropolis and Glob shutdowns. Colin is a named "Rhinoceropolis luminary."

**Publication:** Denver Westword  
**Author:** Kyle Harris  
**Date:** 2018-12-04
